programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Final Cow Down, The: During a long drought in lower Alabama, the cowboys have been chasing green grass throughout the surrounding area. Through new partnerships with other ranchers, they've finally ended up with a bumper crop of calves in north Alabama and a healthy herd in south Florida. Cody and Misty seek out the perfect high-value bull to build their growing cattle business, and they watch as their dream home finally takes shape. Bubba and Kaley welcome baby Ripp Walker Thompson into the world. Booger and Jaclyn surprise Grandma with a cowboy cookbook filled with her recipes and stories from life on the range.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way

Rancher and expert carpenter Bubba Thompson races to build furniture and prepare his house for his soon-to-be wife, Kaley. Rodeo champion and cattle dealer Cody Harris is struggling to carry on after selling his prized rodeo horse in order to buy a home with his new wife, Misty. And, expert cattleman and horse trainer Booger Brown gets a life changing job offer he must consider. Despite their own worries, Booger and Bubba pitch in to buy a new colt for Cody in order to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles

During a shootout, the Missouri Kid kills seasoned detective Charles Schumacher, leaving young George Dougherty to finish the job and avenge his death.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Joe Meek: A Fearless Fighter: Already a seasoned mountain man, Joe Meek has a reputation for raw courage and bravery among the trappers of the west. But Meek becomes a frontier legend when he risks his life in a fearless charge to save the woman that he loves from Crow warriors.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier

programme.title: Wellie Wishers
programme.desc: Meet the WellieWishers™ - a sweet and lively group of friends who play in their whimsical garden. While the girls play, they learn about the natural world and experience the magic of their imaginations. Their sometimes silly, sometimes serious adventures allow them to explore the wonders of their garden - where all living things thrive and grow, along with creativity, friendship, and kindness.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.sub-title: Caillou's Shadow // High Flyers // Caillou's Leaf Pile
programme.desc: Caillou is no longer afraid to ask questions after becoming a "shadow scientist" and learning about shadows at preschool. // Caillou learns to speak up and express his opinion during a play date with Daniel. // Caillou decides to be resourceful and create his own 'jumping pile' after having some fun in the fall leaves.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.desc: It's winter time at Caillou's house and the inquisitive 4-year-old greets the season with his usual curiosity and enthusiasm.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Rushing the Raspberry // Wait to Skate // Caillou's Hiccups
programme.desc: Caillou realizes good things are worth waiting for when he decides to help Mommy grow a raspberry bush. // When Daddy builds an ice rink in the backyard, Caillou comes to realize the importance of being patient. // Caillou learns not to make a mountain out of a molehill when he gets a bad case of the hiccups!

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Cross-Hop // Glitter Glitch // The Untidy Classroom
programme.desc: Caillou learns about the importance of following safety rules after discovering some frogs that need help crossing the street. // Caillou learns the importance of handwashing after he forgets to wash his hands and leaves a trail of glitter around the preschool. // Caillou learns the importance of cleaning up after yourself after Miss Martin suggests a messy experiment in the classroom.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: No Tradebacks! // Shoe Story // Rollie Racers
programme.desc: Caillou learns to stick to his word after hurting a friend's feelings over a toy 'trade'. // Caillou realizes new isn't always better after coveting a pair of snazzy light-up sneakers. // Caillou realizes how great it can be to spend time with family, instead of spending all his time playing with "Rollie Racer" toys.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Song // Follow Me // Where's Caillou?
programme.desc: Caillou learns to accommodate his younger sister when she decides she wants to play keyboard too! // Caillou realizes it helps to try and see things from someone else's perspective when he tries to befriend Andy, the new student at preschool. // Caillou learns that one can find fun in an unusual place – when he and Rosie play an unexpected game of hide and seek!

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Olive Muddle // Caillou's Clay Play // The Lightning Ball Express
programme.desc: Caillou realizes the importance of being honest when Grandma brings over some treats that he doesn't like. // Caillou realizes it's better to tell the truth after breaking Rosie's clay poodle. // Caillou learns that it's better to tell the truth when he accidentally breaks Mrs. Howard's toy train.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Cricket // Dog Dilemma // The Spider Issue
programme.desc: Caillou learns that wild creatures belong in their natural habitat when he inadvertently brings a cricket in the house. // Caillou learns a lesson about jealousy when Sarah gets a new dog. // Caillou learns the difference between fact and fiction after being scared by a friend's comic book.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou Roller Skates // Say Lettuce! // Caillou Tries to Whistle
programme.desc: Caillou learns about perseverance when Daddy brings home a new pair of roller skates for him to try out. // Caillou learns about perseverance when he tries to take a picture of a bunny in Grandma's garden. // Caillou learns it's okay to admit you can't do something, after trying to whistle like Clementine.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: What's Ringette? // Rainy Day at the Beach // Caillou Climbs
programme.desc: Caillou and Leo learn a lesson about keeping an open mind when they try the game of ringette. // Caillou and his family make the best out of a bad situation during a rainy day trip to the beach. // Caillou overcomes his fear of rock climbing when Mommy takes him and Clementine to the community centre.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou Makes a Meal // Caillou's New Groove // Caillou Goes Bowling
programme.desc: Caillou learns that home-made pizza is better than the fast-food pizza they have delivered to their door. // Caillou sees how important it is to adapt to change when Grandpa and Grandma babysit overnight. // Caillou learns to keep an open mind when he tries the game of bowling.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Big Kid Caillou // Caillou's Glasses // Caillou's Dance Party
programme.desc: When Caillou's older friend Andre comes over for a play date, Caillou learns a lesson about the importance of not hiding who you really are. // Caillou realizes how important good vision is after making a pretend pair of glasses // Caillou learns there's more than one way to do things when Miss Martin throws a dance party at preschool.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Hollywood comes to town, Fireman Sam stars in the blockbuster movie remake of one of his most daring rescues. Sam's safety concerns seem justified when 'accidents' start to happen during filming. When he loses his job as safety consultant and Firefighter, Pontypandy must find a way to survive the biggest fire it's ever seen. But, with Sam out of the picture and actor Flex Dexter now in the starring role, who will be able to save the day?

programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams Movie
programme.desc: "When the East Wind blows, it means your berry favorite dream will come true," or that's what Strawberry Shortcake's always heard and she believes it. Strawberry dreams of a world where she and her friends can grow better everyday. But when a poor berry crop puts a strain on the Strawberryland resources, it puts a strain on Strawberry's friends, too. And when the strain causes a falling-out among them, it's a nightmare for Strawberry Shortcake.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. A trip to the North Pole and a visit with Santa make this adventure truly wonderful, until a pile of melting snowballs turns Strawberry's carefully selected presents into a soggy mess. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure. Hearing about a fabled treasure of golden sand-dollars, they set out to find it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: A Basket of Blueberries
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying! Unaware that Strawberry has promised Blueberry she'll take care of Huck at the ball, and feeling sorry for their friend, Lemon and Raspberry independently decide to dress up like Blueberry and fill in for her—neither knowing that the other is also doing so!

programme.title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. “I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!” says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed. To mark the occasion, and to honor all that Berrykin Bloom has done for Berry Bitty City, she decrees that they will have a Berrykin Bloom day, and there will be a ceremony in his honor. Berrykin Bloom is very humble about the whole thing, but the girls wish there was something special they could do to help honor him on his big day.

programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Dilemma // Ruby and the Beast
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: We Have Heroes Specials
programme.desc: Who's that over there? Flash has just spotted another cool creature he can add to his Animal Alphabet!

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: The ZooMoo team learn about the Arctic.

programme.title: World Watch
programme.sub-title: Snow Monkeys / Mouse Lemur / Stingray Ballet
programme.desc: It's January! A special month for Snow Monkeys!

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.sub-title: Japan, Alligator, Binturong and Snow Monkey
programme.desc: Keep up to date with the latest news from around the animal world.

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: Chuck and Fluffy share some hilarious animal videos slips and slides in ice and snow.

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: Keep up to date with the latest news from around the animal world.

programme.title: Pop Fiction
programme.desc: Hear the story of how the elephant came to have a long trunk!

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: Yay! It's the holidays! Celebrate the festive holiday fun with all your friends at ZooMoo!

programme.title: ZooMoo
programme.desc: Yay! It's the holidays! Celebrate the festive holiday fun with all your friends at ZooMoo!

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger
programme.sub-title: Christmas Island Red Crab / Warm Snow
programme.desc: It's the Christmas Island Red Crabs migration!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! Rev and the gang set out to find the kitten, and Operation Kitten Care becomes Operation Rescue! // When Rev leads the gang in a fossil hunting expedition, they find an enormous skull! But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Ping and Friends
programme.desc: Follow Ping and her friends as they find musical inspiration in unlikely places!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After returning home, the Gang have their hands full dealing with the usual thugs, plus a quickly-escalating dispute with the Shadow Clan. So when a new arrival from the Surface lends a hand, Eli welcomes a new team member. But soon this newcomer casts his own shadow on the chaos.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli doesn't believe in ghosts - until he enters Deadweed cavern! But it turns out Eli's first instinct was right. What lurks inside Deadweed is far more evil than ghosts, its El Diablus Nacho, after a supply of the dangerous Dark Water that Dr. Blakk uses to turn innocent slugs into Ghouls.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Lumino cavern is under attack! A swarm of Neurotox ghoul slugs have created a massive toxic cloud that's attacking the residents. The Shane Gang must brave an inescapable maze called the Cavern of Time to locate Blite, the only man who knows enough about regular Neotox slugs to help them stop the cloud created by the ghouls. Just a few problems with that plan: Blite is a deadly maniac, whose reign of terror ended only after Will Shane trapped him in the Cavern of Time.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli has added some awesome new slugs to his arsenal: the Elementals. But the Elemental Slugs are ancient, extremely powerful, and temperamental, and Eli can't control them. Junjie, the newest member of the Shane Gang, has the solution: Eli must learn Slug Fu, the ancient form of slugslinging that Junjie mastered in the Eastern Caverns. Slug Fu is the art of guiding and controlling a slug in battle, a skill that only the greatest slugslingers can master.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Greg Morton
programme.sub-title: I Started Out, as a Baby
programme.desc: Greg Morton had only two choices in schoolyard conflicts. Learn the ways of the force, or use his wit to diffuse situations. That wit would soon lead to winning first prize in the, ‘So You Think You're Funny Contest' and the beginning of his stand-up comedy career. He was no longer the shy introverted kid, drawing cartoons in the corner. He had finally found his voice. A voice he would later use to direct and voice over twenty Saturday Morning cartoons. This former mobile disc jockey, who used to play songs at weddings, now sings song parodies on nationally syndicated radio shows, like the Bob and Tom Show. Take his Obama Man, sung to the tune of Candy Man, which has racked up over 4 million hits on YouTube.

programme.desc: Two rival musicians decide to road trip to their neighboring hometowns together.

programme.title: The Christmas Trap
programme.desc: But surprisingly, the Christmas music brings back memories.

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Christmas Trees
programme.desc: Kayley and Brett team up and try to make their own way home for Christmas.

programme.title: Reindeer Games Homecoming
programme.desc: MacKenzie competes in "The Reindeer Games" keep her father's tradition alive.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Inspired by the perennial bestseller, WHAT TO EXPECT WHEN YOU'RE EXPECTING is a hilarious and heartfelt comedy about five couples whose intertwined lives are turned upside down by the challenges of impending parenthood. The movie features “lots of laughs, heart , and a terrific ensemble of actors at their best” (Pete Hammond, Box Office Magazine) and is “A must see!” (Gayle King, O Magazine). The film stars Cameron Diaz, Jennifer Lopez, Elizabeth Banks, Chace Crawford, Brooklyn Decker, Anna Kendrick, Matthew Morrison, Dennis Quaid, Chris Rock, Rodrigo Santoro, Ben Falcone and Joe Manganiello.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Posing as jewel broker Donnie Brasco, FBI agent Joseph D. Pistone (Johnny Depp) is granted entrance into the violent mob family of aging hit man Lefty Ruggiero (Al Pacino). When his personal and professional lives collide, Pistone jeopardizes his marriage, his job life and, ultimately, the gangster mentor he has come to respect and admire. From acclaimed director Mike Newell (Four Weddings and a Funeral), and featuring an extraordinary supporting cast including Michael Madsen, Anne Heche, Bruno Kirby and James Russo.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: Seeking Justice
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage (CON AIR) is Will Gerard, a family man whose wife, Laura (January Jones of MAD MEN), is attacked. A stranger, Simon (Guy Pearce of THE KING'S SPEECH) offers revenge on the attacker in exchange for a favor from Will.

programme.title: MI-5 (The Greater Good)
programme.desc: When a terrorist escapes custody during a routine handover, Will Holloway (Kit Harington) track him down before an imminent terrorist attack on London.

programme.title: Reign of Fire
programme.desc: When workers in a London tunneling project awaken an unearthly fire-breathing beast from centuries of slumber, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Exodus: Gods And Kings
programme.desc: Acclaimed director Ridley Scott brings new life to the epic story of Moses (Christian Bale) as he takes on the might of an empire and rises up against the Egyptian Pharaoh.

programme.title: The Santa Suit
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Drake Hunter has a plan to boost sales for his father's toy company.

programme.title: Naughty or Nice (2012)
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Holiday humbug Krissy Kringle receives a special delivery intended for Santa.

programme.title: A Family Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An ambitious attorney striving to become partner at her New York law firm.

programme.title: A Holiday in Harlem
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. After years of avoiding Christmas in Harlem, executive Jazmin is finally home.

programme.title: Finding Father Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Christmas for Miranda is a painful reminder of the family she never had.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: The harrowing tale of American heroes shipwrecked in shark-infested waters in the waning days of WWII.

programme.title: Lord of War
programme.desc: A notorious arms dealer sells weapons to dictators and successfully outruns the law for nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman in Bangkok working a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Dave Lizewski makes the simple decision to become a super-hero even though he has no powers or training.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise is attacked by Krall, a warlord sworn against the Federation.

programme.title: Annihilation
programme.desc: A biologist must lead a mission into The Shimmer, a beautiful but deadly world that threatens life on Earth.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five New Yorkers struggle to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Star Trek (2009)
programme.desc: The story of a crew's maiden voyage onboard the most advanced starship ever created: the U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: An author's success consumes him until a mysterious stranger shows him what is most important in his life.

programme.title: Christmas On Division Street
programme.desc: The story of an unusual friendship between a homeless man and a young teenage boy in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four reluctant heroes form an unlikely alliance in order to rescue the town of Silverado from a nasty sheriff.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: The escape of Bubber Reeves from prison affects the inhabitants of a small Southern town.

programme.title: The Mating Of Millie
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman must find a husband so she can adopt a young orphan.

programme.title: How To Save A Marriage (And Ruin Your Life)
programme.desc: To save his best friend's marriage, a lawyer seduces the man's mistress, not realizing it is the wrong woman.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Allied commandos are dispatched inside the Burmese jungle to blow up a bridge built by British POWs.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Pretty In Pink
programme.desc: She's a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He's the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it's threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Shes Having a Baby
programme.desc: Last year at this time, Jake and Kristi were two crazy single kids in love. Now they're two crazy married adults in transition.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Sandy Ricks (Elijah Wood), a young Chicago teenager, has difficulty adjusting after his parents' divorce. Thinking a vacation will help, his mother sends him to spend the summer with his uncle (Paul Hogan) in the Florida Keys. When he arrives, Ricks has nothing but a bad attitude until a chance encounter with the playful dolphin Flipper and a neighborhood girl (Jessica Wesson) snap him out of it. However, Flipper's life is soon in danger when someone starts dumping toxic waste in the ocean.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: Dr. Burke Ryan (Aaron Eckhart) is a self-help guru who is on the verge of a lucrative multimedia deal. But there's a problem: though he advises his patients to confront their pain, Burke has never come to terms with his wife's death. Eloise Chandler (Jennifer Aniston) has had enough of men and dating, and is busy concentrating on her floral business. When they meet, Burke and Eloise feel an instant attraction, but wonder if they'll be able to let go of their painful pasts and embrace the future.

programme.title: Here Come the Munsters
programme.desc: Herman (Edward Herrmann), Lily (Veronica Hamel), Grandpa (Robert Morse) and clan relocate to Los Angeles after torch-wielding neighbors drive them from their Transylvania abode.

programme.title: Christmas Carole
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating businesswoman has earned her a fortune, but it's made her a worse human being.

programme.title: The Munsters' Scary Little Christmas
programme.desc: Herman (Sam McMurray), Lily (Ann Magnuson) and the others try to re-create a Transylvanian holiday for homesick Eddie (Bug Hall).

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Christmas By Candlelight
programme.desc: Wellness expert, Juliet, works on Christmas memory candles with boutique store owner Tom.

programme.title: Christmas in Scotland
programme.desc: On vacation in Scotland, an installation designer enters a festive contest with a local heir.

programme.title: 12 Dares of Christmas
programme.desc: Teacher Elara takes part in a 12 Dares of Christmas challenge with French teacher Gabriel.

programme.title: Santa's Castle
programme.desc: Based on L. Frank Baum's Christmas tales, this story follows the kidnapping of Santa Claus on Christmas Eve by a group of creatures set on sabotaging Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas Tail
programme.desc: A heartwarming tale of friendship and love as single mom Maggie adopts a Labrador for her son Ethan.

programme.title: You Are My Sunshine
programme.desc: Suk-jung's devotion to Eun-ha leads him to search for her after her past and HIV force her to leave him.

programme.title: Norigae: Her Tears
programme.desc: In 2009, an actress's death exposes a major sex scandal. Journalist Lee Jang-ho risks all to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Don't Buy The Seller
programme.desc: It all started with a second hand app. Soo-hyun's comment on the app makes her a serial killer's target.

programme.title: A Very Merry New Year
programme.desc: Secrets and old ties are exposed when Mary gathers her high school friends together to celebrate the New Year.

programme.title: Single Bells
programme.desc: After being scammed by a deceitful in-law, the Bell family loses their family restaurant and the three Bell sisters find themselves single during the holiday season. Hoping to rebuild their father's restaurant, the sisters create weekend holiday single mixers that include great food, dancing and unexpected romance.

programme.title: Mother of a Christmas
programme.desc: Ben and his family plan a family vacation to the beach, including his mother-in-law. When his wife and children experience delays at the airport, he has an unforgettable experience being trapped in a house wit his mother-in-law.

programme.title: Steve Gadd
programme.desc: Many of pianist Chick Corea's compositions have become jazz standards. As a member of Miles Davis' band in the late 1960s, he participated in the birth of the electric jazz fusion movement. In the 1970s, Corea founded the legendary jazz fusion group Return to Forever. Along with Herbie Hancock, McCoy Tyner and Keith Jarrett, Corea is one of the biggest modern jazz pianists. He continued musical collaborations with a diverse range of artists, exploring various musical styles. This broadcast features three performances that illustrate Chick Corea's many talents.

programme.title: David Linx
programme.desc: This might come unexpected, but the Brussels Jazz Orchestra (BJO) is not the kind of jazz orchestra that sticks to standards. They prefer to achieve the highest level by composing original music, creating unique arrangements, and playing inventively as well as passionately. In fact, it really is jazz with a dynamic orchestral sound, with a classic strength in which each musician is also a brilliant soloist. Call it an ‘orchestrated passion for jazz' that incites BJO to create world-class music. Founded in 1993 by Frank Vaganée, Serge Plume and Marc Godfroid, the Brussels Jazz Orchestra is recognised and has been subsidised by the Flemish Government since. Brussels Jazz Orchestra is orchestra in residence at Flagey in Brussels. During this project the BJO performs with David Linx. The Belgian jazz singer will resort to any idiom, any language, any time signature. Occasionally he seems to dispense with bar lines altogether, or he will go beyond lyrics, as he abandons his own words for some free-wheeling scat.

programme.title: Oscar Peterson Trio, Stuff Smith & Ella Fitzgerald
programme.sub-title: O.P. Trio and E. Fitz. - Jazz At The Philharmonic
programme.desc: The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam is a world-renowned concert hall, known for its first-rate acoustics. It has attracted many famous performers over the years and is one of the Netherlands' most treasured musical institutions. On May 5, 1957, jazz impresario Norman Granz presented his Jazz at the Philharmonic tour at the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam. The Canadian pianist Oscar Peterson and his trio of guitarist Herb Ellis and bassist Ray Brown are later joined by trumpeter Roy Eldridge and drummer Jo Jones. As an added attraction, American violinist Stuff Smith joins the proceedings. American singer Ella Fitzgerald, accompanied by pianist Don Abney, Ellis, Brown and Jones, hits her vocal peak in a stunning set that culminates in a jam session of It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing) with the entire ensemble.

programme.title: Charlie Galbraith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Sarah Vaughan, Richard Davis, Ronnell Bright & Art Morgan
programme.desc: Sarah Vaughan: Live in '58 & 64 features the Divine One in her prime, wrapping her sultry voice around jazz standards such as “Lover Man”, “Misty”, and “I Got Rhythm” and popular showtunes such as “Over The Rainbow” and “Maria”. One of the greatest voices of the 20th Century, her renditions of songs by Harold Arlen, Leonard Bernstein, Johnny Burke, the Gershwins, and Stephen Sondheim are pure diva magic. These three performances demonstrate why Sarah Vaughan is invariably mentioned in the same breath as Ella Fitzgerald and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Blondie
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Blondie performs her hits including ''Heart of Glass", "Euphoria", ''Mile High" and many more…

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.desc: London Calling: Live in Hyde Park is a concert video of Bruce Springsteen & the E Street Band's performance during the Hard Rock Calling music festival in Hyde Park, London on June 28, 2009.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 4 in B-flat major, Op. 60
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Ludwig van Beethoven's Symphony No. 4 in B-flat major, Op. 60. Count Franz von Oppersdorff, who adored Beethoven's Symphony No. 2, offered the composer a large sum to write a similar work. Completed in the autumn of 1806, the symphony's first performance was at a private concert in Vienna in March of 1807. Symphony No. 4 is often overshadowed by its revolutionary predecessor and successor. With its lightweight and cheerful nature, Symphony No. 4 contrasts with the two aforementioned works. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Kristof Barati
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms' String Sextet No. 1 in B-flat major, Op. 18. The work is scored for two violins, two violas, and two cellos. Brahms wrote his only two string sextets at the very beginning of his career. String Sextet No. 1 was written in 1860. Brahms was one of the first to compose for this ensemble, blazing a trail for Antonín Dvořák, Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, Arnold Schoenberg, and others. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Claudio Abbado, Simón Bolívar Youth Orchestra & Anna Prohaska
programme.desc: Claudio Abbado conducts the Símon Bolívar Youth Orchestra at the Lucerne Easter Festival of 2010. Soloist is the young and talented Austrian soprano Anna Prohaska. On the program are Sergei Prokofiev's “Scythian Suite”, Op. 20, Alban Berg's Lulu Suite for soprano and orchestra, and Pamina's Aria from W. A. Mozart's opera The Magic Flute. The orchestra concludes with a performance of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6, Op. 74.

programme.title: Thomas Triesschijn
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Gabriela Montero, Youth Orchestra of the Americas & Carlos Miguel Prieto
programme.desc: Venezuelan pianist Gabriela Montero is accompanied by the Youth Orchestra of the Americas conducted by Carlos Miguel Prieto. On the program are Maurice Ravel's Piano Concerto in G Major, as well as two of Montero's own works: the “Latin Concerto” and Improvisations. The performance took place in one of the world's most beautiful concert halls, the Teatro del Lago in Frutillar, located in the middle of the Patagonian plains. The concert hall, which opened its doors in 2010, stands on the banks of Chile's second-largest lake overlooking a volcano that is capped with snow the entire year. In an accompanying interview, Montero speaks about composing, improvising, and performing works of her own alongside those of others. She discusses her home country of Venezuela, where she no longer performs for political reasons.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.sub-title: Mozart - String Quartet No. 19 in C major, K. 465
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances' string quartet – consisting of David Grimal (violin), Hans Peter Hofmann (violin), David Gaillard (viola), and Xavier Phillips (cello) – performs Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's String Quartet No. 19 in C major, K. 465, ‘Dissonance' (Op. 10 No. 6). The String Quartet is the last in the set of six quartets that were dedicated to Joseph Haydn. Written between 1782 and 1785, these are also known as the Haydn Quartets (Op. 10). String Quartet No. 19 is remarkable for its slow, dissonant introduction, giving the piece its nickname. This ominous passage suddenly gives way to the bright Allegro in C major. This performance was recorded at Opéra Comique in Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro: Joel desconfía de Sofía
programme.desc: Joel confirma que una mujer está detrás del mensaje que despistó al operativo antisecuestro. Eso levanta más dudas, sobre la complicidad de Sofía. Eliza prohíbe a Max entrar a la casa.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Anastasia invita a Conrado a pasar la noche juntos, pero les dice a Silvana y a Elías que él es su socio. El agente Riquelme logra capturar a Rony y le saca información para la investigación.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Quezada jura ante el cuerpo de Nataniel que pronto le enviará a Anastasia. Ella lo enfrenta y le advierte que lo quiere fuera de Miami para quedarse con el negocio. Se desata una balacera.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Un extraño muy poderoso enamora a la Tuti a primera vista. Álvaro, hijo del Teca, acorrala a Sara y a Salvador a punta de pistola. Erick y Josefina recuperan el tiempo perdido.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara se encuentra con una escena impactante y no necesita explicaciones, pero Quintanilla sí. Álvaro se alía con la Tuti para llegar a Sara. Salvador sufre las consecuencias de su enfermedad.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Erick se niega a ocupar un puesto inferior y busca al Indio para vengarse por la muerte de su madre. Sara toma una drástica decisión para proteger a su hijo. Salvador no puede creerlo.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Rafaela le da una vuelta de timón a su estrategia, las dudas surgen por todos lados. Es muy pronto para sacar conclusiones, la policía investiga si Salvador se quitó la vida o lo mataron.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: La policía despliega una búsqueda por tierra y aire para arrestar a Rafaela. Ella logra escapar y se refugia en un lugar donde nadie la pueda encontrar. Ingrid es su rehén y comete un "error".

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Marlene, amiga de Eva, le ofrece a Sofía, la amante de Armando, un apartamento y un auto si mantiene en secreto su romance. Eva y Pablo se encuentran y ella le agradece haberla salvado.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Eva acepta salir con Armando para salvar su matrimonio. Ella le confiesa a Marlene su amor por él y que, quizá, se reconcilien. Marlene enfurece. Pablo visita a Eva y revela que piensa en ella.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Eva descubre a su esposo con Sofía en la cama. La joven asegura que está embarazada de Armando, lo que alegra a Marlene. Soraya le cuenta su vida a Eva y le revela que fue prostituída.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda y Juan Marcos hacen el amor. Ella le confiesa a su padre que intentó matarlo. Miguel le pide a Nora ayuda para destruir a Bernardo. Samantha y Nicolás sufren un atentado.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Samantha se muda con Nicolás para protegerlo. Ella y Willy se hacen la prueba de ADN, pero Fernanda logra cambiar los resultados. Nora insiste en su inocencia y accede a hablar de su pasado.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Se incendia la cárcel y la vida de Ángela corre peligro. Bernardo cita a Esteban. Miguel tiene un encuentro romántico con Cecilia. Juan Marcos sigue sin querer saber nada de Ángela, ni de sus confesiones tardías.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Las Villaseñor están felices porque su amoroso padre se queda en casa. Chivis calma los celos de Manuel. Vicente tiene nueva novia llamada Alejandra, Majo busca encuentros casuales con él.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Antonio consigue un vestido de novia para Majo, hace la tarea con Lupita y le pide a Manuel que se aleje de su casa. Chivis se torna irritable. Mauro termina con Lucía por celos con Andrés.

programme.sub-title: No tiene la Culpa el Indio

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: What better way to end the season than with a big party? Pati throws a neighborhood bash and cooks up the easiest and best Mexican-themed dishes that would be a huge hit at any party. And what better accessory to a Mexican fiesta than a giant piñata? Pati also gets the chance to visit a piñata maker in the central market of Morelia. (S9 E13)

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati heads to the coastal city of Champotón, Mexico, and gets a warm welcome from her friend Chachi. They taste their way through the local market and gather groceries for a family dinner at Hacienda Niop, where Pati learns the secrets behind the area's most prized dishes including a giant tamal cooked underground. Back in her home kitchen, Pati makes her own simpler versions of those dishes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati gets an insiders look at Mérida, the capital of the Yucatán, with help from local chefs Pedro Evia and David Cetina. She explores the forefronts of molecular gastronomy, botanas or “bar snacks” at a cantina, family classics at the market, and even foreign influences like Kibi. One thing is for sure, Mérida is a food-lovers' city.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's good friend chef Pedro Evia, of K'u'uk restaurant in Mérida, takes her on one of his favorite day trips – a visit to the coastal town of Celestún. After a meal featuring the morning's catch and seeing the main attraction (the flamingos), the day culminates in a cookout right on the beach. Back in her kitchen, Pati channels the charming fishing village with a simple, yet impressive meal.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sunday in Mérida is a joyous weekly celebration of food, dancing, and culture. The day is incomplete without a family meal. Luckily, chef Roberto Solís, of Néctar restaurant, welcomes Pati into his home for a traditional Sunday supper. Back at home, Pati whips up her own Sunday dinner for her own family, roasted pork tenderloin enchiladas covered in mole verde.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Campeche: Tale of a Pirate City

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's sons are in México, and she wants them to experience the true essence of Yucatán. They climb the ancient ruins of Uxmal, then cool off in one of the thousands of hidden cenotes (swimming holes). To fill their bellies, they eat the best tamales they've ever had along with the region's signature dish, cochinita pibíl. Back home, Pati gives her own twist to this honored dish.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati heads to Izamal, known as the “yellow city” with its colonial buildings all glowing in gold. Pati tastes the local venison tacos that people travel all the way from Mérida to enjoy, and the traditional pok chuk is not to be missed. Back at home, Pati takes the flavors of the region and infuses them into a classic lasagna and a pepita brittle for dessert.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's favorite way to explore a city is without a plan. Today, she's in Valladolid, a city known to most as a stopover between Cancún and Mérida. She tries the local specialties, lomitos de Valladolid and longaniza de Valladolid. Back home, Pati makes her own version of her the lomitos and a soup you'll find on every menu in the region.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Known for white sand beaches, crystal clear turquoise waters and the friendliest locals in the Mexican Caribbean, Isla Mujeres is a haven for people from all over the world. Pati takes a day to explore and try the local delicacy, Tikin Xic. Back home, Pati prepares her own version to share with her boys, along with roasted broccoli and cauliflower and a dessert wrapped in a crispy wafer roll.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores Cancún to taste inventive dishes and experience the fusion of traditional Mexican cuisine with international flavors, like tuna tartar kibi and cold pork belly salad at Casa de Cristian Morales. Back at home, she and her sister, Alisa, are grilling up some summertime specialties: shrimp rolls, grilled potato salad and a pineapple dessert.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is preparing an epic Thanksgiving meal like no other because this one has a Yucatecan twist. Trade in your turkey for a citrus brined bird and boxed stuffing for one with chorizo, apple and cornbread. Brussels sprouts get spiced up with habaneros and pork belly. With Pati's family and closest friends around the table, don't expect there to be any leftovers.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls abandons 13 ordinary British men on a remote, uninhabited island in the Pacific, where they are utterly alone, filming themselves. Can they survive for a month when stripped of all the luxuries and conveniences of 21st-century living? Does modern British man still have the spirit and skills to survive? In this episode, 48 hours since their last meal and hunger grips the group as the harsh reality of island life is dawning. The race is on to bring food back to camp before they become too weak to hunt.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls has abandoned 13 ordinary British men on a remote, uninhabited island. Can they survive for a month completely alone? Stripped of all the luxuries and conveniences of 21st century living, does modern British man still have the wits and skills to survive? The men are radically losing weight, existing on a paltry average of just 300 calories a day. With their very survival hanging in the balance, the castaways lose patience with those they feel are not pulling their weight.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls has abandoned 13 ordinary British men on a remote, uninhabited island to find out if they can survive for a month completely alone? Stripped of all the luxuries and conveniences of 21st century living, does modern British man still have the wits and skills to survive? Three weeks in and the group is barely getting by on a meagre diet of snails and coconuts. Willing to take ever-greater risks for food, Mike and Chris battle with trecherous tides in a desperate search for much needed fruit. But as the hunt for food continues tempers fray and it appears not everyone is pulling their weight.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls has abandoned 13 ordinary British men on a remote, uninhabited island to find out if they can survive for a month completely alone. Stripped of all the luxuries and conveniences of 21st century living, does modern British man still have the wits and skills to survive? In this final episode the men enter their fourth week of living on the island and the group is hungry and divided. And without unity, the men are not gathering enough food to survive. With island life starting to fall apart the men's bodies and minds are beginning to show the strain of the experiment. Even when a stingray arrives in the fishing nets, arguments follow close behind.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls abandons 14 British men on a remote desert island in the Pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. They will be completely alone, filming everything themselves. This time the survival challenge will be harder and longer than before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. From the very beginning the men face a life and death struggle, as the fierce currents of the Pacific Ocean force Bear to drop them 75 meters off the island. The men have no choice but to jump ship and make a desperate swim through the violent swells onto a treacherous, rocky coastline.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls abandons 14 ordinary British women on a remote, uninhabited pacific island, left with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. They're given no food and just a day's supply of drinking water. Like their counterparts on the male island, these women will be utterly alone for six weeks, left to film everything themselves. So when stripped of the luxuries and conveniences of 21stcentury living will these women have the skills and mental strength to survive and rival the male islanders?

programme.desc: Lifeguards investigate an unidentified floating object a kilometre offshore. Harries loses his cool with a tourist. Mario rescues a woman clinging to an inflatable tomato. Deano introduces a new training technique - submersion in an ice bath.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Backpackers trade snowflakes for sunscreen as they flock to Bondi for Christmas. The Hare Krishnas make an appearance, both on land and in the rips. Maxi plays a Christmas prank on his cousin Ryan, and Nicola receives news of a scuba diver drowning off Bondi's northern headland, Ben Buckler.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. The harrowing start to summer is almost repeated when Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men. The never ending battle to get tourists to swim between the flags motivates lifeguards to try unique new techniques.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Santa brings the South Pole to Bondi with the wettest Christmas day in 72 years, as Beardy rescues someone unexpected in atrocious conditions. A seizure on the sand challenges Kerrbox. The attitude of a new trainee raises concerns among some of the Bondi Lifeguards.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Hundreds of Dutch tourists hit Bondi for a New Years swim - straight in to Backpackers Rip. A diabetic comes to the tower with low blood sugar, and then suffers an epileptic fit. Troy uses the Lifeguard security camera to identify a group of bag thieves operating on Bondi.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguard 'Harries' plans to propose to girlfriend Emily high above Bondi in a chopper, and needs the team to make a huge 'Marry Me' sign in the sand. But in the lead up Kerrbox throws a spanner in the works, putting blue paint in Harries' spray tan.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: On the day of the lifeguard challenge, Max and Jesse chase an inflatable boat ride, leading to further trouble when Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake. The lifeguards deal with tourists using cheap boogie boards whose arm leashes break, causing them to quickly sink in deep water.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A surfing collision results in a deep water spinal rescue. Mouse, AKA 'The Black Cloud' lives up to his nick name when he rescues a man with no pants, gets kicked in the face, and is then vomited on. And lifeguards try catch a rat that's been eating through the electrical cables on their buggies.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Snoop Dogg visits Bondi on New Years. Lifeguards arrive at 5am, rescuing partygoers from rips. One girl loses consciousness, but lifeguard suspect she is a serial offender intentionally endangering herself. The emergency chopper is called for a missing swimmer last seen in the water two hours ago.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Chappo and H-man cautiously prepare a 19 year old German tourist for hospital after he's broken his back. programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi is never more dangerous than on big surf days. Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don't go as planned. Later lifeguards go head to head - including new trainees Glick and Jethro - for the biggest ride of summer.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: An 8 year old girl is missing at North Bondi. A young boy suffers a spinal injury on his birthday. And the Bondi Lifeguards 'Dads Club' welcomes its newest members ‚Äì as Whippet, Harries and Deano all bring their kids to Bondi.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A woman is found lifeless between the flags, she's not breathing and doesn't have a pulse. As lifeguards begin chest compressions to try bring her back to life, the woman's mentally impaired son arrives looking for mum. A very special episode of Bondi Rescue, not to be missed.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
